prompt: quick question about the accept flow. a mate who does driveways said button-click acceptance feels a bit flimsy legally, he reckons customers should actually sign something. should I add e-signatures to the public quote page before I launch?
assertions: Grounds the advice in the project plan: cites specific, accurate details from clearcontract_project_plan.md (phases, schema, architecture decisions, or the Out of Scope list)
Notices that quote e-signatures are explicitly listed in the plan's Out of Scope list (section 9)
Presents at least two genuine alternatives to the user's proposal (a defended 'defer / do nothing' counts as one)
Commits to a single clear recommendation rather than a neutral pros/cons list
Weighs build cost concretely for a solo part-time developer (time estimates or specific complexity costs like new collections/hooks)
